creator: bryan@shatow.net
text:
Currently, when building any port, the "portmgr options" such as DOCS, EXAMPLES and NLS are not included in the resulting pkgng package.
	Specifically, the options do not show in ALL_OPTIONS, so they are not added into the yaml. Adding them into ALL_OPTIONS makes them show in 'make showconfig', which is probably not wanted.

	The reason this is a problem is that I am trying to detect if options have changed between a port and an older package with poudriere. Because of these 3 missing, the options are always different. I could easily add a hack for these 3, but more may be added later, or removed from the "portmgr options".

Fix: Patch fixes this by defining a PORTMGR_OPTIONS and then adding these into the pkgng yaml. It is done so that if the port has any of the "portmgr options" in its OPTIONS_DEFINE, it will properly NOT re-add it to the yaml. Instead of specifically checking these 3 options in bsd.pkgng.mk, use PORTMGR_OPTIONS as more options may be defined later.

	# With fix
	$ cd /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/portlint
	$ make deinstall install
	$ pkg query '%Ok %Ov' portlint
	DOCS on
	NLS on
	EXAMPLES on
	$ echo "OPTIONS_UNSET=DOCS" >> /etc/make.conf
	$ make deinstall install
	$ pkg query '%Ok %Ov' portlint
	DOCS off
	NLS on
	EXAMPLES on
How-To-Repeat: 	$ echo "WITH_PKGNG=yes" >> /etc/make.conf
	$ make -C /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/portlint install
	$ pkg query '%Ok %Ov' portlint
	-- no results --
